title: Zenith [16x]
description: A summer seashore themed 1.8.9 pvp pack
body:
Zenith is a summer themed pack that is based around the seashore summer vibe. As the vibe suggests, it is mainly made out of cyan and yellow :)

It is mainly made for 1.8.9 bedwars but can be used overall in 1.8.9.

Here are some screenshots taken with the pack :)

![Zenith Prev1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2485d256ffeaf72c1d6d694f4960852fc9fa31bf.jpeg)

![Zenith Prev2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c26d9010ee3cdd5b2d990513a5018340d161cc10.jpeg)

![Zenith Prev3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3723f2f1f0232cea30891d878c57f644e721503.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
